CREATE TEMP FUNCTION NetWorkDays(start_date DATE, end_date DATE)
RETURNS INT64
LANGUAGE js AS """
    if (start_date >= end_date) {
        return 0;
    }
    
    // Parse dates properly - BigQuery DATE comes as string
    const start = new Date(start_date.toString());
    const end = new Date(end_date.toString());
    
    let count = 0;
    const current = new Date(start.getTime());
    
    // Move to the day after start_date (for difference calculation)
    current.setDate(current.getDate() + 1);
    
    while (current <= end) {
        const day = current.getDay();
        if (day !== 0 && day !== 6) { // Not Sunday or Saturday
            count++;
        }
        current.setDate(current.getDate() + 1);
    }
    
    return count;
""";

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE

  paid_date                        DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the order was actually paid."),
  ops_approved_date                DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when Ops team approved the order."),
  ops_rejected_date                DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when Ops team rejected the order."),
  document_completed_datetime      TIMESTAMP OPTIONS(description="Timestamp when Document KYC/KYB Completed."),
  price                            NUMERIC   OPTIONS(description="Price of the order at creation time."),
  rejection_reason                 STRING    OPTIONS(description="Reason provided for order rejection (if any)."),
  voucher_code                     STRING    OPTIONS(description="Voucher or discount code applied to the order."),
  latest_doc_verification_status   STRING    OPTIONS (description= "Status of Merchant's last KYC, e.g: INITIAL,VERIFIED, MANUALLY_VERIFIED, PENDING VERIFICATION"),
  latest_detail_doc_verification_status    STRING    OPTIONS (description= "Rejection Status of Merchant's last KYB, e.g: INITIAL,VERIFIED, MANUALLY_VERIFIED, PENDING VERIFICATION"),
  failed_verification_at          STRING    OPTIONS(description= "KYB/KYC/NOT YET SUBMIT DOC"),

  -- Order Location & Area Info
  orders_address                  STRING    OPTIONS(description="Full delivery address for the order."),
  orders_district                 STRING    OPTIONS(description="District (kecamatan) of the delivery address."),
  orders_regency                  STRING    OPTIONS(description="Regency/city (kabupaten/kota) of the delivery address."),
  orders_province                 STRING    OPTIONS(description="Province of the delivery address."),
  orders_zip_code                 STRING    OPTIONS(description="ZIP or postal code of the delivery address."),

  rse_email                       STRING    OPTIONS(description="Email address of the RSE who created the order."),
  rse_lead_stage                  STRING    OPTIONS(description="Lead stage of the RSE when the order was created (e.g., hot_leads, deal)."),
  rse_speaker_sn_from_ots         STRING    OPTIONS(description="Serial number of the speaker device from On-The-Spot (OTS) order, if applicable."),
  ots_flag                        STRING    OPTIONS(description="Flag indicating whether the order was created via OTS process (Enum: YES/NO)."),
  sales_prospero_id               STRING    OPTIONS(description="Unique Prospero ID of the Retail Sales Executive who made the order."),
  start_date_ms_active            DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the acquiring RSE started being active."),
  resigned_jkt_date               DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the acquiring RSE resigned."),
  is_currently_active             BOOLEAN   OPTIONS(description="Flag indicating whether the RSE is currently active (True, False)"),
  role_type                       STRING    OPTIONS(description="Role type of Retail whether RSE, RSl, HoRS, BD"),

  -- QRIS Registration Process

  qris_accepted_date              DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the QRIS order was accepted."),
  qris_rejected_date              DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the QRIS order was rejected."),
  qris_final_date                 DATE      OPTIONS(description="Date when the QRIS order reached its final state."),

  courier_code                     STRING     OPTIONS(description="Courier service code used for delivery."),
  courier_service_code             STRING    OPTIONS(description="Courier service type (e.g., REG, EXP)."),

  order_send_to_vendor_flag        INT64      OPTIONS(description="Binary flag indicating if order was sent to vendor for printing (1=Sent, NULL=Not Sent)."),

  order_delivered_flag             INT64      OPTIONS(description="Binary flag indicating if order was delivered to merchant (1=Delivered, NULL=Not Delivered)."),
  order_has_transacted_more_than_1_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Binary flag indicating if device has completed more than 1 transaction (1=Yes, NULL=No)."),
  order_has_all_time_tpv_more_than_IDR_15K_flag INT64 OPTIONS(description="Binary flag indicating if total TPV exceeds IDR 15,000 activation threshold (1=Activated, NULL=Not Activated)."),

  send_to_nobu_vs_final_answer_workdays       INT64 OPTIONS(description="Number of workdays between send to NOBU and NOBU's final response."),

  qris_accepted_vs_send_to_vendor_workdays    INT64 OPTIONS(description="Workdays between QRIS accepted and vendor printing."),
  send_to_vendor_vs_finished_printing_workdays INT64 OPTIONS(description="Workdays between vendor receipt and print completion."),
  finished_print_vs_dispatch_workdays         INT64 OPTIONS(description="Workdays between print completion and dispatch."),
  dispatch_vs_delivery_calenderdays           INT64 OPTIONS(description="Calendar days between dispatch and delivery."),
  delivered_vs_activated_calendardays         INT64 OPTIONS(description="Calendar days between delivery and activation."),
  ops_approved_vs_delivered_workdays          INT64 OPTIONS(description= "Working days between ops approval and delivery."),
  ops_approved_vs_delivered_calenderdays      INT64 OPTIONS(description= "Calender days between ops approval and delivery."),
  order_paid_vs_delivered_calenderdays        INT64 OPTIONS(description= "Calender days between ops approval and delivery."),
  order_paid_vs_delivered_workdays            INT64 OPTIONS(description= "Working days between ops approval and delivery."),

  -- SLA Status Labels

  sla_status_send_to_nobu_vs_final_answer           STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for NOBU response window."),
  sla_qris_final_vs_qris_accepted_answer            STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for QRIS acceptance delay."),
  sla_qris_accepted_vs_send_to_vendor               STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for vendor printing trigger."),
  sla_send_to_vendor_vs_finished_printing           STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for vendor print completion."),
  sla_finished_print_vs_dispatch                    STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for dispatch readiness."),
  sla_status_dispatch_vs_delivery                   STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for delivery completion."),
  sla_status_delivered_vs_activated                 STRING OPTIONS(description="SLA status for post-delivery activation."),

  -- Funnel Status Indicators

  ops_approval_status              STRING     OPTIONS(description="Current approval status from Ops team: 'OPS APPROVED', 'OPS REJECTED', or 'WAITING FOR OPS'."),

  send_to_nobu_flag                STRING     OPTIONS(description="Status of submission to NOBU: 'ORDER SEND TO NOBU' or 'NOT YET SEND TO NOBU'."),

  delivery_flag_stats              STRING     OPTIONS(description="Delivery status: 'DELIVERED', 'FAILED DELIVERY' (returned), or 'ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED'."),

  finished_printing_merge          STRING     OPTIONS(description="Combined printing completion status: 'VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING' or 'VENDOR HASN'T REPLY'."),
  send_data_vendor_print_merge     STRING     OPTIONS(description="Combined vendor printing workflow status: 'SEND TO VENDOR - FINISHED', 'SEND TO VENDOR - HASN'T REPLIED', or 'NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING'."),
  dispatch_and_delivery_merge      STRING     OPTIONS(description="Combined dispatch and delivery status: 'DISPATCHED - DELIVERED', 'DISPATCHED - FAILED DELIVERY', 'DISPATCHED - ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED', or 'NOT YET DISPATCHED'."),
  not_yet_dispatched_merge         STRING     OPTIONS(description="Refined breakdown of undispatched status excluding IN_DELIVERY orders, showing either ops delay or system mapping failure."),

  -- Profiling Information
  storeType                        STRING     OPTIONS(description="Store type classification from profiling data."),
  retailTypePoi                    STRING     OPTIONS(description="Retail type Point-of-Interest from profiling."),
  businessindustry                 STRING     OPTIONS(description="Business industry segment."),
  businessTypes                    STRING     OPTIONS(description="Business type description."),
  loanOwnership                    STRING     OPTIONS(description="Ownership type of business loan."),
  businesslocation                 STRING     OPTIONS(description="Business location classification."),
  numberOfBranches                 STRING     OPTIONS(description="Number of branches reported by merchant."),
  interestedinloan                 STRING     OPTIONS(description="Whether merchant expressed interest in loans."),
  desiredloanlimit                 INT64      OPTIONS(description="Desired loan limit indicated by merchant."),
  edcOwnership                     STRING     OPTIONS(description="edc ownership indicated by merchant."),   
  retailqrisOwnership              STRING     OPTIONS(description="qris ownership indicated by merchant."),
  rejection_category               STRING     OPTIONS(description="Rejection by Nobu or PTEN."),

   -- Product context
  product_id          STRING    OPTIONS(description="Unique identifier of the product ordered by the merchant."),
  original_price      INT64     OPTIONS(description="Original listed price of the product before any discount, in IDR."),
  voucher_discount            INT64     OPTIONS(description="Discount amount applied to the product price, in IDR."),
  final_price         NUMERIC     OPTIONS(description="Final price paid by the merchant after discount, in IDR."),
  product_sku         STRING    OPTIONS(description="Stock Keeping Unit code identifying the product variant, for example qris-soundbox."),
  product_name        STRING    OPTIONS(description="Display name of the product, for example BukuPay Speaker."),
  product_description STRING    OPTIONS(description="Short description of the product, typically mirrors the product name."),
  flow                STRING    OPTIONS(description="Tagging where flow is through influencer or not")
)
OPTIONS(
  description="Table containing extends from the base retail_order_data with detailed funnel tracking, SLA monitoring, delivery logistics, device mapping, and post-delivery transaction activity.",
  labels=[("domain","retail_payment"),("owner","data_team"),("source","retail_order_data_pipeline"),("table","retail_order_delivery_funnel")]
)
AS



WITH retail_order AS (
  SELECT * FROM ledger-fcc1e.retail_payment_base.retail_order_data
  WHERE transaction_number NOT LIKE 'RTUMIMGR%'  
)
,
max_deliveries_tbl AS ( --from biteship
    SELECT 
        order_id,
        MAX(deliveries.updated_at) last_updated_at
       FROM `ledger-fcc1e.db_retail_backend.deliveries` deliveries
     LEFT JOIN UNNEST(delivery_progress.history) AS history_values
     GROUP BY ALL
)

,deliveries_tbl AS (
    SELECT 
        order_id,
        waybill_id,
        UPPER(logistic_courier.courier_code) AS courier_code,
        UPPER(logistic_courier.courier_service_code) AS courier_service_code,
        UPPER(delivery_status) AS delivery_status,
        history_values.value.status AS status,
        history_values.value.manifest_description AS manifest_description,
        history_values.value.updated_at updated_at_raw,
        history_values.value.manifest_date manifest_date_raw,
        SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.updated_at),
        SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.manifest_date),
        COALESCE(
           
            SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.updated_at),
            SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.manifest_date),
            TIMESTAMP(history_values.value.updated_at), 
            TIMESTAMP(history_values.value.manifest_date)
        ) AS updated_at,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY order_id 
            ORDER BY COALESCE(
       
                SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.updated_at),
                SAFE.PARSE_TIMESTAMP('%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S', history_values.value.manifest_date),
                TIMESTAMP(history_values.value.updated_at),
                TIMESTAMP(history_values.value.manifest_date)
            ) ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM `ledger-fcc1e.db_retail_backend.deliveries`
    LEFT JOIN UNNEST(delivery_progress.history) AS history_values
)

   , delivered_manual AS(
    SELECT 
        awbnumber waybill_id,
        shipmentstatus_name,
        logistic_name,
        rate_name,
        "DELIVERED" delivery_status,
        DATE(internalstatus_updatedate) updated_at,
        "DELIVERED" AS status_flagging

    FROM `ledger-fcc1e.temp_hadi.shipper_delivery_status` 
    WHERE UPPER(shipmentstatus_name) = "BERHASIL DIKIRIM" OR UPPER(internalstatus_name) LIKE "%DELIVERED TO%"
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY awbnumber ORDER BY internalstatus_updatedate DESC)=1
   )

 , picked_and_delivered_only AS (
    SELECT
        order_id,
        waybill_id,
        courier_code,
        courier_service_code,
        COALESCE(status, manifest_description, delivered_manual.delivery_status) AS status,
        COALESCE(deliveries_tbl.delivery_status, delivered_manual.delivery_status) AS delivery_status,
        COALESCE(DATE(deliveries_tbl.updated_at), DATE(delivered_manual.updated_at)) AS updated_at,
        "DELIVERED" AS status_flagging
    FROM deliveries_tbl 
    LEFT JOIN delivered_manual USING (waybill_id)
    WHERE rn = (
        SELECT MAX(rn) 
        FROM deliveries_tbl d2 
        WHERE d2.order_id = deliveries_tbl.order_id
    )
    AND (LOWER(COALESCE(deliveries_tbl.delivery_status, status, manifest_description)) LIKE "%delivered%" OR 
   delivered_manual.delivery_status ="DELIVERED")
   
   UNION ALL

  SELECT
        order_id,
        waybill_id,
        courier_code,
        courier_service_code,
        COALESCE(status, manifest_description) AS status,
        delivery_status,
        DATE(updated_at) updated_at,
        "PICKUP" AS status_flagging
    FROM deliveries_tbl d1
    WHERE rn = (
        SELECT MIN(rn) 
        FROM deliveries_tbl d2 
        WHERE d2.order_id = d1.order_id)
 )

  FROM picked_and_delivered_only
)

, retail_transaction AS (
  SELECT
  business_id,
  MIN(CASE WHEN transaction_amount >= 15000 THEN transaction_date_jkt ELSE NULL END) AS first_trx_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT transaction_id) AS total_all_time_transaction,
  SUM(transaction_amount) AS total_all_time_tpv_idr,
  SUM(CASE 
    WHEN FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m', transaction_date_jkt) = FORMAT_DATE('%Y-%m', CURRENT_DATE())
    THEN transaction_amount 
    ELSE 0 
  END) AS current_month_tpv_idr,
  SUM(settlement_amount) settlement_amount_lifetime,
  MIN(settlement_date) first_settlement_date,
  MAX(settlement_date) last_settlement_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT settlement_id) AS total_all_time_settlement,
  COUNT(DISTINCT settlement_date) AS total_all_time_settlement_days,
FROM `ledger-fcc1e.retail_payment_base.retail_transaction_data`
GROUP BY 1
)

, daily_tpv_data AS (

SELECT phone_number,
transaction_date_jkt AS transaction_date,
SUM(transaction_amount) AS tpv
FROM `ledger-fcc1e.retail_payment_base.retail_transaction_data`
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY transaction_date_jkt ASC
)

, cumulative_tpv_check AS (
  SELECT 
    phone_number,
    transaction_date,
    tpv,
    SUM(tpv) OVER (
      PARTITION BY phone_number 
      ORDER BY transaction_date 
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS cumulative_tpv
  FROM daily_tpv_data
)

, check_activation_threshold AS (
SELECT 
  phone_number,
  MIN(CASE WHEN cumulative_tpv >= 15000 THEN transaction_date END) as threshold_date
FROM cumulative_tpv_check
GROUP BY phone_number
)

,retail_printing_data_tbl AS (
     SELECT 
        order_id,
        nmid,
       CAST( COALESCE(DATE(SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%d %B %Y', requested_date)),DATE(requested_date)) AS STRING)  AS send_to_vendor_date,
        finished_print_date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY order_id 
            ORDER BY 
                CASE 
                    WHEN finished_print_date  IS NOT NULL THEN finished_print_date
                    ELSE requested_date
                END DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM `ledger-fcc1e.temp_erald.compile_qris_printign_retail`
    WHERE requested_date IS NOT NULL
    AND (
        (finished_print_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(finished_print_date) > 1)
        OR finished_print_date IS NULL
    )

    UNION ALL


SELECT
    order_id,
    nmid,
    SAFE_CAST(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', requested_date) AS STRING) AS send_to_vendor_date,
    SAFE_CAST(
        COALESCE(
            SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%e/%m/%Y', finished_print_date),
            SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d',  finished_print_date)
        ) AS STRING
    ) AS finished_print_date,
    
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY order_id
        ORDER BY
            CASE
                WHEN finished_print_date IS NOT NULL
                THEN SAFE_CAST(
                        COALESCE(
                            SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%e/%m/%Y', finished_print_date),
                            SAFE.PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d',  finished_print_date)
                        ) AS STRING
                     )
                ELSE SAFE_CAST(PARSE_DATE('%Y-%m-%d', requested_date) AS STRING)
            END DESC
    ) AS rn

FROM `retail_payment_base.compile_qris_printing_retail_v2`

)
, retail_printing_data_raw AS(
SELECT 
    order_id,
    nmid,
    send_to_vendor_date,
    finished_print_date
FROM retail_printing_data_tbl
WHERE rn = 1
)

, retail_printing_data_with_row AS (
  SELECT *,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY nmid ORDER BY send_to_vendor_date ASC) AS row_num__
  FROM retail_printing_data_raw

, retail_printing_data AS (
  SELECT * EXCEPT (row_num__)
  FROM retail_printing_data_with_row

, base_kyc_kyb AS (
 SELECT 
    user_id,
    step,
    attempt_at,
    dimension,
    CASE WHEN dimension IN ("KTP", "FACE_COMPARISON") THEN last_kyc_status ELSE last_kyb_status END status,
    CASE 
    WHEN UPPER(last_kyc_status) NOT LIKE "%VERIFIED%" 
      THEN "2. KYC- NOT YET VERIFIED"
    WHEN UPPER(last_kyb_status) NOT LIKE "%VERIFIED%" AND last_kyb_status IS NOT NULL 
      THEN "4. KYB - NOT YET VERIFIED"
    WHEN UPPER(last_kyc_status) LIKE "%VERIFIED%" AND last_kyb_status IS NULL 
      THEN "3. KYB - NOT YET SUBMITTED"
    ELSE "5. KYC/KYB VERIFIED" 
    END AS failed_verification_at,
    detail_status,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id, dimension ORDER BY attempt_at DESC) AS rn_latest,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY attempt_at DESC) AS rn_overall
  FROM `ledger-fcc1e.trb_pymnts_derived.kyc_kyb_attempt`
),

ktp AS (
  SELECT user_id, status AS status_ktp, detail_status AS detail_status_ktp
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE dimension = 'KTP' AND rn_latest = 1
),

face AS (
  SELECT user_id, status AS status_face_comparison, detail_status AS detail_status_face_comparison
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE dimension = 'FACE_COMPARISON' AND rn_latest = 1
),

store AS (
  SELECT user_id, status AS status_kyb, detail_status AS detail_status_kyb
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE dimension LIKE "%STORE%" AND rn_latest = 1
),

overall_latest AS (
  SELECT 
    user_id,
    failed_verification_at,
    CONCAT(step, ' ', CASE WHEN UPPER(status) LIKE "%VERIFIED%" THEN "VERIFIED" ELSE status END) AS latest_status,
    detail_status             AS latest_detail_status
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE rn_overall = 1
),

kyc_success AS (
  SELECT user_id, LOGICAL_AND(status = 'SUCCESS') AS all_kyc_success
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE step = 'KYC'
  GROUP BY user_id
),

kyb_success AS (
  SELECT user_id, LOGICAL_AND(status = 'SUCCESS') AS all_kyb_success
  FROM base_kyc_kyb
  WHERE step = 'KYB'
  GROUP BY user_id
)
, kyc_kyb_status AS(
SELECT
  k.user_id,
  k.status_ktp,
  k.detail_status_ktp,
  f.status_face_comparison,
  f.detail_status_face_comparison,
  s.status_kyb,
  s.detail_status_kyb,
  CASE 
    WHEN kyc.all_kyc_success AND kyb.all_kyb_success THEN 'VERIFIED'
    ELSE o.latest_status
  END AS latest_status,
  CASE 
    WHEN kyc.all_kyc_success AND kyb.all_kyb_success THEN 'VERIFIED'
    ELSE o.latest_detail_status
  END AS latest_detail_status,
 failed_verification_at,
FROM ktp k
LEFT JOIN face f        USING (user_id)
LEFT JOIN overall_latest o USING (user_id)
LEFT JOIN kyc_success kyc USING (user_id)
LEFT JOIN kyb_success kyb USING (user_id)
LEFT JOIN store s        USING (user_id)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY k.user_id) = 1


)

retail_transaction.total_all_time_settlement,
retail_transaction.total_all_time_settlement_days,

CASE 
WHEN latest_status IS NULL THEN "KYC - NOT YET SUBMITTED"
WHEN failed_verification_at = "KYC" AND latest_status LIKE "KYB" THEN "KYC REJECTED" 
WHEN failed_verification_at = "KYB" AND latest_status LIKE "KYC" THEN "KYB PENDING SUBMISSION" 
END AS latest_doc_verification_status,

, with_operational_flag AS (

SELECT *,

-- Operational Flag
CASE WHEN document_completed_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS document_completed_flag,
CASE WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS ops_approved_flag,
CASE WHEN qris_pending_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_send_to_nobu_flag,
CASE WHEN qris_final_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_qris_has_final_answer_flag,
CASE WHEN qris_accepted_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_qris_accepted_flag,
CASE WHEN send_to_vendor_printing_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_send_to_vendor_flag,
CASE WHEN finished_print_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag,
CASE WHEN is_mapped_by_ops = 1 THEN 1 END mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag, 
CASE WHEN picked_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS picked_date_flag,
CASE WHEN delivered_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END AS order_delivered_flag,
CASE WHEN total_transaction > 1 THEN 1 END AS order_has_transacted_more_than_1_flag,
CASE WHEN total_all_time_tpv_idr > 15000 THEN 1 END order_has_all_time_tpv_more_than_IDR_15K_flag,

--- SLA LOGIC

-- Document Completed vs Ops Approved
CASE 
  WHEN document_completed_date IS NOT NULL AND ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL THEN NetWorkDays(document_completed_date, ops_approved_date) 
  WHEN document_completed_date IS NOT NULL AND ops_approved_date IS NULL THEN NetWorkDays(document_completed_date, CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Jakarta')) 
  END AS document_completed_vs_ops_approved_workdays,

CASE 
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_pending_date IS NOT NULL THEN NetWorkDays(ops_approved_date, qris_pending_date) 
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_pending_date IS NULL THEN NetWorkDays(ops_approved_date, CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Jakarta')) 
  END AS ops_approved_vs_send_to_nobu_workdays,
-- 
-- Send to NOBU vs QRIS Final Answer
CASE 
  WHEN qris_pending_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_final_date IS NOT NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_pending_date, qris_final_date) 
  WHEN qris_pending_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_final_date IS NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_pending_date, CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Jakarta')) 
  END AS send_to_nobu_vs_final_answer_workdays,

-- QRIS Final Answer Vs QRIS Acceptance
CASE 
WHEN qris_final_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_accepted_date IS NOT NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_final_date, qris_accepted_date) 
 WHEN qris_final_date IS NOT NULL AND qris_accepted_date IS NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_final_date, CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Jakarta')) 
  END AS qris_final_vs_qris_accepted_answer_workdays,


-- -- QRIS Acceptance vs Soundbox Mapping
--   CASE
--   WHEN qris_accepted_date IS NOT NULL AND mapping_to_soundbox_date IS NOT NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_accepted_date,mapping_to_soundbox_date) 
--   WHEN qris_accepted_date IS NOT NULL AND mapping_to_soundbox_date IS NULL THEN NetWorkDays(qris_accepted_date, CURRENT_DATE('Asia/Jakarta')) 
--   END AS qris_accepted_vs_soundbox_mapping_workdays,

-- -- QRIS Soundbox Mapping vs QRIS Send to Vendor Printing
-- CASE

    WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_status = "QRIS_PENDING" THEN "WAITING FOR NOBU RESPONSE" --- resubmission or second submission by merchant but stil pending 
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_status <> "QRIS_PENDING" THEN "QRIS HAS FINAL ANSWER"
  END AS nobu_answer_flag,

-- QRIS Acceptance Flag
CASE

  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL THEN "QRIS ACCEPTED"
    WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL  AND order_status LIKE "%REFUND%" AND refund_at_attempt <3 THEN "QRIS REJECTED < 3 ATTEMPTS" 
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL  AND order_status LIKE "%REFUND%" AND refund_at_attempt >=3 AND order_version ="New Orders after resubmission feature" THEN "QRIS REJECTED >= 3 ATTEMPTS" --include where rejection in new flow less than 3 attempt
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NULL THEN "QRIS REJECTED < 3 ATTEMPTS"

  
   END qris_acceptance_flag,

-- RESUBMISSION STATUS
   CASE WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL  AND order_status LIKE "%RESUBMISSION%" AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), resubmission_available_date, DAY) <=3   THEN "RESUBMISSION_PENDING ≤ 3 DAYS" -- waiting for resubmit <= 3 days
   WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL  AND order_status LIKE "%RESUBMISSION%" AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), resubmission_available_date, DAY) > 3   THEN "RESUBMISSION_PENDING > 3 DAYS" -- waiting for resubmit <= 3 days

    -- refund before 3x attempt
  END AS resubmission_flag,

  -- Mapping QRIS to Soundbox by Ops Flag
CASE
   WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 AND(mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) THEN "QRIS TO SOUNDBOX MAPPED" 
   WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 AND mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NULL THEN "QRIS TO SOUNDBOX PENDING MAPPING" 
  -- WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NOT NULL THEN "QRIS TO SOUNDBOX MAPPED" 
  -- WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NULL THEN "QRIS TO SOUNDBOX PENDING MAPPING"
  END AS mapping_flag_stats,

-- Send Data Print Vendor Flag
CASE 
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_vendor_flag  IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 THEN "SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING" -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_vendor_flag  IS NULL AND submission_flag =1  THEN "NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING" END AS send_data_print_vendor, -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here

-- Finished Vendor Print Flag
CASE
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1  THEN "VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING" -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NULL AND submission_flag =1  THEN "VENDOR HASN'T REPLIED"  -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here
  END AS finished_vendor_print,


-- Dispatched Flag
CASE
  WHEN awb = "OTS" THEN "DISPATCHED"
   WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY") THEN "DISPATCHED"
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NOT NULL  AND submission_flag =1  THEN "DISPATCHED" -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NULL  AND submission_flag =1  THEN "NOT YET DISPATCHED" -- Chris adding mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL logic here
  END AS dispatch_flag_stats,

-- breakdown of not yet dispatched based on order_finished_printing compare to current date
CASE 
WHEN awb = "OTS" THEN NULL
WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NULL  AND submission_flag =1  AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(), DATE(finished_print_date), DAY) <= 2 THEN "AWAITING DISPATCH BY OPS" 
WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NULL  AND submission_flag =1  AND DATE_DIFF(CURRENT_DATE(),DATE(finished_print_date), DAY) > 2 THEN "DISPATCHED BY OPS BUT PANACEA SCRIPT FAILED TO MAPPED" END not_yet_dispatched_stats,

-- Delivery Flag
CASE
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NOT NULL AND delivered_date IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1  THEN "DELIVERED"
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND (mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1  AND delivery_status IN ("RETURNED") THEN "FAILED DELIVERY"
  WHEN ops_approved_date IS NOT NULL AND order_send_to_nobu_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_has_final_answer_flag IS NOT NULL AND order_qris_accepted_flag IS NOT NULL AND submission_flag =1 AND(mapping_soundbox_by_ops_flag IS NOT NULL OR order_send_to_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL) AND order_finished_printing_by_vendor_flag IS NOT NULL AND picked_date IS NOT NULL AND (delivered_date IS NULL OR delivery_status NOT IN ("RETURNED")) THEN "ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED" END AS delivery_flag_stats,


FROM with_operational_flag)
, compile AS(
SELECT *,
CASE
  WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY", "DELIVERED") THEN "SEND TO VENDOR"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") THEN "SEND TO VENDOR"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") THEN "NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING"
  END AS send_data_vendor_merge,

CASE
  WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY") THEN "VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") AND finished_vendor_print IN ("VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING") THEN "VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") AND finished_vendor_print IN ("VENDOR HASN'T REPLIED") THEN "VENDOR HASN'T REPLY"
  END AS finished_printing_merge,

CASE
  WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY") THEN "SEND TO VENDOR - FINISHED"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") AND finished_vendor_print IN ("VENDOR FINISHED PRINTING") THEN "SEND TO VENDOR - FINISHED"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") AND finished_vendor_print IN ("VENDOR HASN'T REPLIED") THEN "SEND TO VENDOR - HASN'T REPLIED"
  WHEN send_data_print_vendor IN ("NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING") THEN "NOT YET SEND TO VENDOR PRINTING"
  END AS send_data_vendor_print_merge,

CASE
  WHEN awb = "OTS" THEN "DISPATCHED - DELIVERED"
    WHEN dispatch_flag_stats IN ("DISPATCHED") AND delivery_flag_stats IN ("DELIVERED") THEN "DISPATCHED - DELIVERED"
  WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY") THEN "DISPATCHED - ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED"

  WHEN dispatch_flag_stats IN ("DISPATCHED") AND delivery_flag_stats IN ("FAILED DELIVERY") THEN "DISPATCHED - FAILED DELIVERY"
  WHEN dispatch_flag_stats IN ("DISPATCHED") AND delivery_flag_stats IN ("ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED") THEN "DISPATCHED - ORDER STILL HASN'T ARRIVED"
  WHEN dispatch_flag_stats IN ("NOT YET DISPATCHED") THEN "NOT YET DISPATCHED"
  END AS dispatch_and_delivery_merge,
CASE 
WHEN UPPER(order_status) IN ("IN_DELIVERY") THEN NULL
WHEN dispatch_flag_stats IN ("NOT YET DISPATCHED") THEN not_yet_dispatched_stats END  not_yet_dispatched_merge,

CASE WHEN UPPER(rejection_reason) LIKE "%MCC%" THEN "PTEN Rejection" ELSE "Nobu Rejection" END rejection_category
FROM with_biz_logic)

, profiling AS(
 
SELECT * FROM(
SELECT 
  phoneNumber,
  storeType,
  retailTypePoi,
  businessindustry,
    ARRAY_TO_STRING(ARRAY(SELECT value FROM UNNEST(businessTypes)), ', ') AS businessTypes,
  loanOwnership,
  businesslocation,
  numberOfBranches,
  interestedinloan,
  desiredloanlimit,
  edcOwnership,
  ARRAY_TO_STRING(
  ARRAY(
    SELECT value
    FROM UNNEST(retailqrisOwnership)
  ),
  ', '
) AS retailqrisOwnership,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY phoneNumber ORDER BY createdAt DESC) AS rn
FROM `merchant_success_analytics.ms_merchant_profiling_ssot`
) WHERE rn=1 
)

,ots_serial_number AS(

  SELECT 
  DISTINCT 
  phoneNumber,
  retailSpeakerSerialNumber

)

    role_type

    AND LOWER(role_type) LIKE "%retail%"
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY UPPER(candidate_name) ORDER BY start_date_ms_active DESC) =1

)
